signals.headline: US Signals New Iran Talks Within Days as Ceasefire Holds | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Signals New Iran Talks Within Days as Ceasefire Holds | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced a new round of US-Iran negotiations could occur within days, with VP JD Vance confirming the ceasefire—now 6-7 days old—is holding amid ongoing diplomatic efforts in Islamabad, Pakistan.[1][2][3]  
This follows failed first-round talks, with both sides preparing clearer positions on Iran'

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 inflation rate confirmed at 2.16% YoY (up from 2.00% in Feb), with MoM rise of 0.34% | NO | HIGH confidence** [3]

South Korea's latest monthly inflation data for March 2026 shows a year-over-year rate of **2.16%**, an increase from February 2026's 2.00%, driven by a 0.34% month-to-month gain; the CPI reached 118.8[3]. This is the most recent release available as of April 15
